summary: Comprehensive testing of NEW features: Parental location lock system, heartbeat location tracking, PDF generation, and WhatsApp sharing. All 15 backend API tests PASSED. All 6 frontend UI tests PASSED. Key features verified: location lock/unlock with DNI requirement, GPS status banner with BLOQUEADO badge, PDF download buttons, WhatsApp share links.
passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/location/lock - Successfully locks location settings
BACKEND: GET /api/location/status - Returns correct lock status (locked, setup_completed, tracking_active)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/unlock-location - Requires DNI verification (400 without)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/unlock-location - Requires reason (400 without)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/unlock-location - Admin unlock succeeds with valid DNI + reason
BACKEND: POST /api/family/location/update - Heartbeat location update works
BACKEND: GET /api/family/member/{id}/location - Returns last known location with maps_url
BACKEND: GET /api/family/member/{id}/location - Returns 404 for non-existent user
BACKEND: GET /api/documents/welcome-pdf - Generates valid PDF (application/pdf content-type)
BACKEND: GET /api/documents/setup-complete-pdf - Generates valid PDF
BACKEND: PDF endpoints require authentication (401 without login)
BACKEND: GET /api/documents/whatsapp-share/welcome - Returns valid wa.me URL
BACKEND: GET /api/documents/whatsapp-share/setup-complete - Returns valid wa.me URL
BACKEND: GET /api/documents/whatsapp-share/{invalid} - Returns 400 for invalid type
FRONTEND: Home page loads correctly (regression)
FRONTEND: ThankYouPage shows product name 'SENTINEL X Basic' correctly
FRONTEND: ThankYouPage has documents-section with PDF download button
FRONTEND: ThankYouPage PDF button links to /api/documents/welcome-pdf
FRONTEND: ThankYouPage has WhatsApp share button linking to wa.me
FRONTEND: FamilyMode GPS status banner visible with BLOQUEADO badge when locked
FRONTEND: FamilyMode correctly hides 'Activar' button when location is locked
FRONTEND: Sentinel-X page loads correctly (regression)
seed_data_creation: None - using existing admin user ceo@manoprotect.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: NEW features iteration_57 fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/location/lock, GET /api/location/status, POST /api/admin/unlock-location (requires dni_verified=true and reason), POST /api/family/location/update, GET /api/family/member/{id}/location, GET /api/documents/welcome-pdf, GET /api/documents/setup-complete-pdf, GET /api/documents/whatsapp-share/{welcome|setup-complete}. Key data-testid attributes: locked-badge, gps-status-banner, btn-activate-gps, documents-section, download-welcome-pdf, share-whatsapp. Location lock status is persisted in user document with location_locked boolean. Admin unlock requires super_admin or admin role + DNI verification.
